g.title: wrong_stop

g.title: version_note
g.text: .66 and .65 are VARIANT codes, NOT sequential builds.
AS02 (.66) is the NEWER build despite higher variant number.
AS03 (.65) is slightly older for the same 87B0 PCB.
chain from AS03 for 87B0 — AS02 is the terminus.

g.title: correct_flags
g.text: NO force flags needed when subsystems match.
→ no force flags exist in Linux binary
